project.name: Blonde Blazer Romance
project.objective: Create a romantic short-form fashion promo with a premium editorial feel.

scenes.name: Scene 1
scenes.description: Close up of blonde blazer face locking eye contact with camera.
scenes.text overlay: Fall in love with the look
scenes.subject: lead_talent
scenes.notes: Use the strongest direct eye-contact shot available.

scenes.name: Scene 2
scenes.description: Medium shot revealing the blazer silhouette with subtle body turn and fabric motion.
scenes.subject: lead_talent
scenes.notes: Prioritize movement that shows the jacket shape.

scenes.name: Scene 3
scenes.description: Insert sequence of premium details like lapel texture, buttons, and jewelry accents.
scenes.notes: If no macro footage exists, use the best stills with motion.

scenes.name: Scene 4
scenes.description: Hero portrait ending with poised smile and a final branded call to action.
scenes.subject: lead_talent
scenes.notes: This is the payoff frame. Use the cleanest, most iconic image.
